name: proptech-lotes-peru
description: Plataforma comparador de lotes y terrenos en Perú

scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/db && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:prod: cd packages/db && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:reset: cd packages/db && npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd packages/db && npm install && cd ../../apps/api && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
scripts.lint: cd apps/api && npm run lint && cd ../web && npm run lint
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:generate && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
